name: eggd_cgp-cnvkit-pon
title: eggd_cgp-cnvkit-pon
summary: Builds a CNVkit panel-of-normals (PoN) reference from per-sample coverage files produced by eggd_cgp-cnvkit-coverage. Output reference.cnn is the input to eggd_cgp-cnvkit-batch.

inputSpec.name: coverage_files
inputSpec.label: Per-sample coverage files (.targetcoverage.cnn)
inputSpec.help: One .targetcoverage.cnn file per sample, produced by eggd_cgp-cnvkit-coverage. Minimum 10 files recommended; 20+ preferred for a stable PoN median. All files must have been generated with the same BED and target_avg_size settings.

inputSpec.name: pon_name
inputSpec.label: Output reference filename stem (no extension)
inputSpec.help: Base name for the output .cnn reference file. Default: cgp_cnvkit_reference.

outputSpec.name: cn_reference
outputSpec.label: CNVkit PoN reference (.cnn)
outputSpec.help: Pooled PoN reference file encoding per-interval median and spread across all input samples. Pass to eggd_cgp-cnvkit-batch as cn_reference.

outputSpec.name: reference_stats
outputSpec.label: Reference summary statistics (.tsv)
outputSpec.help: TSV of summary metrics: n_intervals, log2_mean, log2_median, log2_stdev, depth_median, n_samples. Use to verify the PoN was built correctly.
